Fix npm global install permission error

Configure npm to use user-writable ~/.npm-global directory instead of
system /boot/system/lib/node_modules which requires root privileges.

commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

Fix installer to check npm prerequisite first

for Claude Code. This ensures we install dependencies in the correct order.

New flow: check npm → install npm if needed → check claude → install claude if needed

commit.message:
Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: conversation lifecycle — per-channel timeouts, AI close, cleanup worker

- Channel-specific timeouts for GHL (webchat=10m, whatsapp=60m, sms=60m,
  facebook=30m, instagram=30m, email=24h) — configurable via channel_timeouts
- AI close_conversation tool: agent detects when conversation ends naturally
  (user says bye, appointment booked, query resolved) and closes with
  summary + result classification
- Cleanup worker: sweeps stale conversations every 5min, auto-generates
  summaries via Gemini on timeout
- Both WhatsApp and GHL services support close detection
- Migration 023: adds channel_timeouts, summary, result, closed_by columns

feat: 土日限定統合ワークフロー & 週末まとめレポート追加

- .github/workflows/keiba_weekend.yml を新規作成
  ・morning ジョブ: 土日 05:00 JST（予想ページ生成）
  ・notify  ジョブ: 土日 09:00-16:30 JST 15分おき（20分前LINE通知）
  ・weekly_summary ジョブ: 日曜 17:00 JST（土日合算まとめ）
  ・各ジョブに JRA 開催日チェック → 非開催日は即 exit 0
  ・concurrency でジョブの多重起動を防止
  ・workflow_dispatch で morning/notify/summary/test を手動実行可能

- src/scheduler/daily_batch.py を新規作成
  ・is_jra_race_day(): urllib のみ（Selenium不要）で軽量チェック
    → セカンダリチェック（db.netkeiba.com）付きのフォールバック構造
  ・send_weekend_summary(): predictions_log.csv から土日2日分を集計
    的中率・収支・回収率を LINE テキスト送信
  ・--morning / --notify / --weekly-summary の3モードに対応

perf: confirmed 300p steady-state ~9.5ms avg, update capacity table

- Tick profile: avg 9.5ms (mv~4.3ms, snap~4.3ms) — 49% improvement vs pre-dt-fix

- Client LOD: auto-generate THREE.LOD levels via MeshoptSimplifier for static entities
- ModelCache: remove _memCache WeakMap (IndexedDB+ETag is sufficient)
- TickHandler: remove redundant velocity writeback after physics skip
- movement.js: tune DEFAULT_MOVEMENT constants (higher accel, lower friction)
- world/index.js: tune movement params for snappier feel
- CLAUDE.md: update perf section with confirmed measurements and capacity table

commit.message:
Add modules 02, 05, 07, 08, 09

- Module 02: Markov Decision Processes (gridworld, Bellman equations)
- Module 05: Temporal Difference Learning (TD(0), SARSA, Q-Learning)
- Module 07: Deep Q-Networks (replay buffer, target network, DQN on CartPole)

- Module 09: Actor-Critic (A2C, advantage, entropy bonus)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: strengthen guidance for marking plan steps as completed (#46)

The LLM was setting plan steps to in_progress but never calling
UpdatePlanStep with 'completed', leaving steps spinning indefinitely
in the UI.

- system_prompt.py: explicit 2-step lifecycle (in_progress → completed)
  with note that users see real-time progress
- plan.py: when steps are in_progress, inject IMPORTANT reminder to
  mark them completed before moving on; differentiate from pending nudge

feat(generation): Stage 2 multi-doc MVP + generate.py (Stage 4.2)

Stage 2 — DocumentContext and generation loop:
- _DocEntry splits prefix_tokens/tokens(body)/suffix_tokens so layout
  policies apply correctly; add_corpus_doc applies both prefix and suffix
- add_corpus_doc, add_generated_doc, can_add_document, make_room,
  evict_oldest_aux, has_identifier, find_evicted/restore_evicted stubs
- get_all_documents() returns root first, active aux, then evicted
- _generate_doc gains per-token link detection (max_recent_link_tokens)
- _handle_link: skip empty/dup, corpus fetch, generation fallback,
  eviction-aware room estimation
- _process_existing_doc_links for corpus doc recursive link handling
- GenerationConfig.repetition_penalty; applied in _generate_doc before
  sampling to prevent mode collapse
- Bug fix: cross_doc_mask._build_cross_doc_mask link_end_pos is
  exclusive; containment check corrected to span.start < pos <= span.end
- 101 new tests; 344 total passing

Stage 4.2 — generate.py standalone CLI:
- load_inference_model reconstructs arch + weights + tokenizer +
  link_detector + layout_policy from hyperparameters.json
- PretokCorpus wraps GraphIndex + PretokShardedBackend
- Patches flex_attention with torch.compile(dynamic=True) — surgical,
  fast; compiled kernels cached at .torch_compile_cache/
- --repetition-penalty (default 1.3), --max-link-depth (default 2),
  --allow-generation-fallback (off by default when --dataset provided)
- Per-doc quality metrics: entropy_frac and bits/tok over generated
  body tokens only; post-generation forward pass
- ANSI link highlighting; doc truncation with full link list
- configs/large_32k.yaml: 36L/1280D/32k training config for A100 80GB

commit.message:
Voice receive pipeline: SRTP + DAVE decrypt, Opus decode, OpenAI Realtime

Full audio pipeline implemented but DAVE E2EE decryption produces
corrupted audio. Whisper cannot transcribe captured WAV files despite
spectral analysis showing speech-like characteristics.

What works:
- VoiceReceiver: raw UDP socket reading in daemon thread
- SRTP aead_xchacha20_poly1305_rtpsize decryption via PyNaCl
- DAVE E2EE decryption via dave-py (reports success but output is wrong)
- Opus ctypes decoder (48kHz stereo)
- Stereo-to-mono conversion + scipy resample_poly (48k→24k)
- Silence padding for OpenAI server VAD end-of-speech detection
- Async callback bridge (thread → event loop via run_coroutine_threadsafe)
- Audio flows end-to-end: Discord → OpenAI → garbled transcription

Known issue:
- DAVE decrypt returns non-None (appears successful) but Opus frames
  are corrupted. Decoded PCM has correct spectral statistics (RMS, ZCR,
  frequency distribution) but Whisper returns empty transcription.
  Root cause: likely wrong key ratchet generation or DAVE frame counter
  mismatch. This is a fundamental limitation of reverse-engineering
  Discord's undocumented DAVE E2EE protocol.

Next step: Pivot to LiveKit for proven voice transport.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Calibrate dynasty values to KTC scale with surgical projection fixes

- QB 1QB youth rate: 0.045→0.020 (stops young QBs double-dipping age bonus)
- Disable rawFloor for QBs (was collapsing QB8-30 into flat 3,500 band)
- QB 1QB formula: pk 7500→8500, dc 0.880→0.900
- Travis Hunter: PPR 295→195 (dual-role WR/CB realistic Year 2)
- Tetairoa McMillan: PPR 308→235 (Year 2 WR, not elite starter)
- Puka Nacua: PPR 315→270 (solid starter, not WR2 territory)
- Patrick Mahomes: PPR 408→425 (now ranks QB2-3 behind Lamar/Allen)
- Saquon Barkley: PPR 348→328 (age-29 conservative 2026 projection)
- Kyle Pitts: PPR 188→215 (elite athletic TE, too conservative before)
